MAP.COMMENT: map JMSMessage data to Event documnet

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: split dependency_code and add to list
split challenge_code and add to list

INVOKE.COMMENT: get period details for specific condition
compare dates and update the status

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

MAP.COMMENT: ---VE-1438 Publish Change Event Notification to Async Service ---
---VE-1438 Publish Change Event Notification to Async Service ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: check whether transient error or not

SEQUENCE.NAME: true
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: transient error, throw exception for retry

Values.value: Failed to execute dependencyCompletionRequest. Throwing exception for retry.

SEQUENCE.NAME: false
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: not transient error, push message to dead letter queue
